{ "cells": [ { "cell_type": "code", "execution_count": 10, "id": "69cf1755-b09a-43df-8f2e-0801f72dba0a", "metadata": {}, "outputs": [], "source": [ "import pandas as pd\n", "import numpy as np\n", "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n", "from sklearn.linear_model import Perceptron\n", "from sklearn.model_selection import KFold, cross_val_score, cross_val_predict\n", "from sklearn.preprocessing import LabelEncoder, StandardScaler\n", "from sklearn.metrics import accuracy_score, confusion_matrix, classification_report, ConfusionMatrixDisplay\n", "\n", "# incarcam datele\n", "df = pd.read_csv('data/Teen_Mental_Health_Dataset.csv')\n", "\n", "# eliminam atributele stress_level, anxiety_level si addiction_level\n", "df = df.drop(['stress_level', 'anxiety_level', 'addiction_level'], axis=1)\n", "\n", "# transformam variabile text în numerice\n", "def encode_text(df, columns):\n", " le = LabelEncoder()\n", " for col in columns:\n", " df[col] = le.fit_transform(df[col])\n", " return df\n", "\n", "categoriale = ['gender', 'platform_usage', 'social_interaction_level']\n", "df = encode_text(df, categoriale)\n", "\n", "# separare X (atribute) si y (scop)\n", "X = df.drop('depression_label', axis=1).values.astype(np.float32)\n", "y = df['depression_label'].values.astype(np.float32)\n", "\n", "# standardizam datele\n", "scaler = StandardScaler()\n", "X_std = scaler.fit_transform(X)\n", "\n", "# functie pentru rularea experimentului\n", "def experiment_perceptron(k_val, eta, max_it, early_st):\n", " print(f\"\\n{'='*30}\")\n", " print(f\"EXPERIMENT: K={k_val}, eta0={eta}, max_iter={max_it}\")\n", " \n", " ppn = Perceptron(eta0=eta, max_iter=max_it, early_stopping=early_st, random_state=42)\n", " kf = KFold(n_splits=k_val, shuffle=True, random_state=42)\n", " \n", " # genera, predictiile prin Cross-Validation (K-Fold)\n", " y_pred = cross_val_predict(ppn, X_std, y, cv=kf)\n", " \n", " # calculam si afisam acuratetea\n", " acc = accuracy_score(y, y_pred)\n", " print(f\"ACURATEȚE: {acc:.4f}\")\n", " \n", " # afisam raportul de clasificare (precision, recall, F1-Score)\n", " print(\"\\nRAPORT DE CLASIFICARE:\")\n", " print(classification_report(y, y_pred))\n", " \n", " # calculam matricea de confuzie\n", " cm = confusion_matrix(y, y_pred)\n", " print(\"MATRICEA DE CONFUZIE:\")\n", " print(cm)\n", " \n", " # partea de rapoarte\n", " fig, ax = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(12, 5))\n", " \n", " # matricea de confuzie (Heatmap)\n", " ConfusionMatrixDisplay(confusion_matrix=cm).plot(ax=ax[0], cmap='Blues')\n", " ax[0].set_title(f\"Matrice Confuzie (K={k_val})\")\n", " \n", " # comparare valori reale vs predicțti \n", " # luam doar primele 50 de instante\n", " t = pd.DataFrame({'real': y[:50], 'predit': y_pred[:50]})\n", " ax[1].plot(t['real'].tolist(), label='Real', marker='o', linestyle='')\n", " ax[1].plot(t['predit'].tolist(), label='Predit', marker='x', linestyle='')\n", " ax[1].set_title(\"Real vs Predictie (esantion 50)\")\n", " ax[1].legend()\n", " \n", " plt.tight_layout()\n", " plt.show()" ] }, { "cell_type": "code", "execution_count": 11, "id": "5c5acf90-3b03-4731-949c-d55ea3b82192", "metadata": {}, "outputs": [ { "name": "stdout", "output_type": "stream", "text": [ "\n", "==============================\n", "EXPERIMENT: K=5, eta0=0.01, max_iter=100\n", "ACURATEȚE: 0.9542\n", "\n", "RAPORT DE CLASIFICARE:\n", " precision recall f1-score support\n", "\n", " 0.0 0.98 0.98 0.98 1169\n", " 1.0 0.10 0.10 0.10 31\n", "\n", " accuracy 0.95 1200\n", " macro avg 0.54 0.54 0.54 1200\n", "weighted avg 0.95 0.95 0.95 1200\n", "\n", "MATRICEA DE CONFUZIE:\n", "[[1142 27]\n", " [ 28 3]]\n" ] }, { "data": { "image/png": "iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAABJ4AAAH9CAYAAABbS7a5AAAAOnRFWHRTb2Z0d2FyZQBNYXRwbG90bGliIHZlcnNpb24zLjEwLjgsIGh0dHBzOi8vbWF0cGxvdGxpYi5vcmcvwVt1zgAAAAlwSFlzAAAPYQAAD2EBqD+naQAAfIhJREFUeJzt3XlcVGX7x/HvsA2LMgoKiKLivuauobnlSmb6VD8tzTSXMlMjMn3USi2XtDJTcysTd23Tssy0LFrUUtJyy8pwySAsFdwAwfP7w5jHEVCQGQamz5vXeb2c+9xzn2vmAHO8uO77mAzDMAQAAAAAAADYmZuzAwAAAAAAAIBrIvEEAAAAAAAAhyDxBAAAAAAAAIcg8QQAAAAAAACHIPEEAAAAAAAAhyDxBAAAAAAAAIcg8QQAAAAAAACHIPEEAAAAAAAAhyDxBAAAAAAAAIcg8YQiJyYmRiaTSSaTSV988UW2/YZhqFq1ajKZTGrXrt1NHWPevHmKiYnJ13O++OKLXGNytLS0NM2dO1e33XabSpcuLS8vL5UvX169evVSbGysw4//9NNPq2LFivLw8FCpUqXsPn7WOT9y5Ihdx/3qq69kNpt19OhRa1u7du1Ur169bH03btwoX19fRURE6PTp0wU6buXKla3fw1dvQ4cOtem3ePFilS9fXufPny/Q8QAAsJerr8NMJpM8PDxUrlw53Xffffrll18cfnyTyaSJEyc6/DjXc+TIEZv3wM3NTYGBgbrjjju0ffv2QolhwIABqly5sk3bzbw3f/zxhyZOnKg9e/Zk2zdx4kSZTKabDzIXy5YtU9myZXX27Fm7j+0IzniP8qJdu3Y5Xk927do1W99Lly5p0qRJqly5ssxms2rVqqU5c+Zk69evXz/17NmzEKIHbHk4OwAgNyVLltTixYuzJZdiY2N1+PBhlSxZ8qbHnjdvnsqUKaMBAwbk+TmNGzfW9u3bVadOnZs+7s3466+/1LVrV/34448aOHCgnnrqKQUEBOjEiRN6//331aFDB8XFxalBgwYOOf7777+vKVOmaPz48YqMjJTZbLb7Mbp166bt27erXLlydhvTMAxFRUVpyJAhqlSp0nX7rl69Wv3791fbtm21fv16+fn5Ffj4rVq10ksvvWTTFhwcbPO4f//+mj59umbMmKFJkyYV+JgAANjLkiVLVKtWLaWmpuqbb77RlClT9Pnnn+unn35S6dKlnR1eoRgxYoT69OmjzMxM7d+/X5MmTVL79u21fft2NWrUqNDj2b59uypUqJCv5/zxxx/WhETDhg1t9g0ePDjHJEZBXLhwQePGjdOYMWMKdK1emAr7PcqPKlWqaOXKlTZtOf0ReNiwYVq+fLmef/55NWvWTJ988okef/xxnT17VuPGjbP2mzhxomrVqqWtW7fq9ttvd3T4gBWJJxRZvXv31sqVK/Xaa6/J39/f2r548WJFREQoJSWlUOK4dOmSTCaT/P39deuttxbKMa/24IMP6ocfftAnn3yS7QPivvvuU3R0tEMvAPft2ydJGjlypIKCghxyjLJly6ps2bJ2HXPTpk36/vvvtWrVquv2mz9/voYPH66ePXtq9erV8vLyssvxS5UqdcPvFw8PDz3yyCN6/vnnNWbMGPn6+trl2AAAFFS9evXUtGlTSVcqLzIzMzVhwgStX79eDz30kJOjKxwVK1a0fpa3atVK1apVU4cOHTRv3jy9/vrrOT7n4sWL8vb2dkiVjL2vQytUqJDvRNaNLF26VH///bcGDx5s13GdxRHvUX74+Pjc8Lzv379fixcv1pQpU/TUU09JuvIz+/fff2vy5MkaOnSoAgICJElVq1ZV165d9cILL5B4QqFiqh2KrPvvv1/SlWqULMnJyXr33Xc1cODAHJ8zadIktWjRQgEBAfL391fjxo21ePFiGYZh7VO5cmXt379fsbGx1pLVrFLmrOl0y5cv15NPPqny5cvLbDbr119/zXWq3bfffqvu3bsrMDB
